Game console shipments are expected to fall 19.5% this year to 33.9 million units, according to new analyst data.

Read more
matches.title: Analyst: Game console shipments expected to decline 19.5% to 33.9m units in 2026

matches.summary: Estimates from data firm Aliena Analytics suggest Steam generated $11.1 billion in H1 revenue, up 14.5% year-over-year, marking the platform's highest half-year revenue on r
matches.title: Alinea: Steam revenue reaches $11.1bn, marking highest half-year on record

matches.summary: New Zealand's game sector continues to grow as combined studio revenue supported by its Game Development Sector Rebate (GDSR) rose 17% to $829 million in 2025/26.
matches.title: "New Zealand's success is being built by ambitious studios of all sizes" – Combined revenue of studios supported by rebate grows 17% to $829m

matches.summary: Nintendo has confirmed that sales of its original Switch console system - including its Lite and OLED models - will be discontinued in Europe next year.
matches.title: Nintendo confirms Switch 1 consoles will be withdrawn from Europe following EU law change on batteries
